# Generated Files Registry
#
# One line per generated file in .aid/generated/. Format:
#   <output-path>|<build-command>
#
# - output-path: relative to the target project root (where .aid/ lives)
# - build-command: shell command to regenerate, run from the target project root
#
# Consumed by:
#   - /aid-discover FIX state (refresh-all at end of cycle per principles.md P3)
#   - /aid-discover state-fix.md Step 4 (`test -f` loop confirms each file was regenerated)
#
# Comments (lines starting with #) and blank lines are ignored.
# Order matters: scripts are executed top-to-bottom, so list dependencies first.
#
# PATH CONVENTION: build commands use repo-root paths under canonical/. The
# renderer (run_generator.py + rewrite_install_paths in harness.py) rewrites
# those repo-root references at render time to each profile's install-tree
# root (.claude for Claude Code, .agents for Codex assets, .cursor for Cursor).
# So this registry's source-form paths are correct in canonical/ AND the
# renderer makes them correct in every profile install. No runtime resolver
# is needed in consuming skills.
#
# (Note: this comment block is skipped by the rewriter — see harness.py
# rewrite_install_paths docstring on the comment-skip rule — so the prose
# above survives intact in profile renders.)

# Project file inventory — read by discovery sub-agents as a pre-pass.
# Depends on: the entire project file tree.
.aid/generated/project-index.md|bash .cursor/scripts/kb/build-project-index.sh --root . --output .aid/generated/project-index.md

# Numeric metrics (T3 facts) — line counts, file counts, term counts, severity tallies.
# Depends on: KB doc disk state + frontmatter contracts.
.aid/generated/metrics.md|bash .cursor/scripts/kb/build-metrics.sh --root . --output .aid/generated/metrics.md

# KB index — agent-facing 2-3 line summary per KB doc, composed from frontmatter intent:.
# Depends on: every KB doc's frontmatter (changes to intent: fields).
# MUST run AFTER hand-edits to KB docs and BEFORE final commit.
.aid/knowledge/INDEX.md|bash .cursor/scripts/kb/build-index.sh --root .aid/knowledge --output .aid/knowledge/INDEX.md
